subcodes.first_line: O Karim! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of all worlds. In these days thy mention hath repeatedly flowed from the Most Exalted Pen. The Greater Branch in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کریم علیک بهاء الله رب العالمین این ایام مکرر ذکرت از قلم اعلی نازل غصن اکبر در این
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement
